page.subtitle: We cross-check whether everything you designed is actually reflected in the code, and point out what's missing or needs fixing.
page.subtitle_note: This isn't grading your code — it's confirming it was built as designed.
page.guide_btn_title: Show the Lint page user guide again

error.github_url_required: Please set the GitHub URL on the Code screen first.
error.run_failed: An error occurred while running Lint.

guide.headline: Code Lint
guide.sub: Automatically cross-checks your vibe-coded result against the Plan and Design specs to measure compliance, and turns violations into a fix spec all at once with the Fix Agent.

step1.title: Lint Phase Overview
step1.subtitle: Validate Vibe-coded Project
step1.desc: Verifies whether the code written by the AI agent follows the specs defined in the Plan/Design stage (PRD · SPACK · DDD · Architecture · coding rules). It catches regressions without manual code review.
step1.tip: Automate spec compliance with the vibe-coding → Lint → Fix Agent loop.

step2.title: Set the GitHub URL First
step2.subtitle: Pre-requisite
step2.desc: Register the target GitHub repo URL on the Code screen. Both Public and Private are supported (Private requires a GitHub OAuth connection), and once set it is reused automatically on the next Lint run.
step2.tip: If it's not set yet, the "Go to CODE" button on the Lint screen takes you straight there.

step3.title: Run Lint — Compliance by Category
step3.subtitle: SPACK · DDD · Architecture · Rules · Plan
step3.desc: One "RUN LINT" checks compliance across 5 categories (SPACK spec, DDD model, Architecture structure, coding rules, plan items). Plan items (stories·screens) are semantically matched against the code by AI — with file:line evidence — even when titles are in Korean. The % on each card is the pass rate, and clicking a card shows the detailed pass/fail rule list.
step3.tip: Cached results show instantly, and you can re-check with the "force" option.

step4.title: Constraint Fix Agent — Auto-fix spec
step4.subtitle: Auto-fix Workflow
step4.desc: Gathers the failed rules and automatically generates a fix spec that AI agents (Claude Code / Cursor, etc.) can apply directly. Paste the spec into the agent to fix the code → Run Lint again → pass rate ↑.
step4.tip: Repeat Run Lint → Fix Agent → Run Lint to converge toward 100% compliance.

stats.cache_banner_stale_desc: If the code has changed since then, a fresh analysis is more accurate.
stats.meaning_text: This score is the ratio of design spec items implemented in code (design-to-code traceability). It does not guarantee code quality, correctness, or absence of bugs.
stats.coverage_text: Sampled only {sampled} ({pct}%) of {total} total code files. The score is based on the inspected files; uninspected code is not reflected.

empty.check_url: Verify the repository URL is correct (current: {url})
empty.check_public: Verify it's a Public repository (Private requires an auth token)
empty.check_retry: Try again shortly (possible GitHub API rate limit)
empty.loading_desc: Querying the spec from Neo4j and inspecting GitHub code. This can take up to 3 minutes.
empty.empty_desc:
Enter a GitHub URL and run Run Lint to
check SPACK / DDD / Architecture / Rules / Plan compliance.

method.deterministic_title: Directly matched via static analysis of the code
method.llm_title: Result verified by the LLM reading the file body
method.fallback_title: Both deterministic matching and LLM verification failed

store.enqueue_failed: Failed to enqueue Lint job — task_id missing.
store.fix_spec_enqueue_failed: Failed to enqueue Fix spec job — task_id missing.
store.no_permission: You don't have permission for the '{project}' project. Upload a new meeting log on the Plan page to create the project first.
store.queue_unavailable: The AI job queue is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in 1-2 minutes.
store.rate_limit: Too many requests (limit of 3 per minute). Please try again shortly.
store.run_timeout: The Lint analysis didn't finish within 10 minutes. The repo may be very large or workers may be delayed. Please try again shortly.
store.fix_spec_missing_input: A project name and GitHub URL are required.
store.fix_spec_no_result: No Lint results. Please run an analysis first.
store.fix_spec_default: Failed to generate the fix spec.
store.fix_spec_timeout: Fix spec generation didn't finish within 10 minutes. Please try again shortly.

coverage.subtitle: How RUN LINT matched your PRD plan items (screens·stories) against the code. Missing items can be exported as an AI fix instruction in one click.
coverage.empty: No plan items (screens·stories) found. Create a PRD first in '01 Meeting Log'.
coverage.all_done: All plan items implemented. Nothing missing 🎉
coverage.copy_missing: Copy {n} missing as AI fix instruction
coverage.copied: Fix instruction for missing items copied. Paste it into Cursor·Claude.
coverage.fix_prompt_header: The following plan items are not yet implemented in the code. Please implement each one.
